## Documentation issue

What part of the documentation needs attention?

Examples:

- Installation instructions
- Configuration options
- Enhancement descriptions
- Audit/debug logging instructions
- WCAG Enhancement Map
- Known limitations
- README wording
- Broken link
- Typo or formatting issue
- Other

## Describe the issue

Explain what is confusing, incorrect, missing, outdated, or unclear.

## Location in the documentation

File Name: 
Section Title: 
Heading:
Link:

Examples:

- `README.md`
- `WCAG Enhancement Map`
- `Installation`
- `Configuration Options`
- `Known Limitations`
- `enhancements/exampleFile.js`

## Suggested change

If you have a suggested correction or improvement, add it here.

```md
Paste suggested wording here, if applicable
```

## Why this matters

Explain why the documentation change would help.

Examples:

- Prevents install mistakes
- Clarifies how an enhancement works
- Makes the WCAG mapping more accurate
- Helps developers test the library correctly
- Reduces confusion during accessibility review

## Additional context

Add screenshots, links, console messages, version details, or any other helpful context.
